scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:dev --prefix server" "npx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web "npm run start:prod --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
